title: Off-by-one error and bare except
author: contributor
pr_description: Adds batch processing for items list.
diff:
--- a/processor.py
+++ b/processor.py
@@ -30,8 +30,14 @@ def process_items(items):
+    results = []
+    for i in range(1, len(items)):
+        try:
+            results.append(transform(items[i]))
+        except:
+            pass
+    return results

gold_issues.description: range(1, len(items)) skips index 0 — the first item is never processed.
Bare except catches SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt, masking real errors.
